subcodes.first_line: In this day the Sun of grace is manifest, and the Ocean of bounty surgeth, and that which Divine and consummate wisdom hath ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز آفتاب فضل هویداست و دریای عنایت مواج و آنچه را حکمت بالغه الهیه اقتضا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
